allow: Bash(python -c "import pkg_resources; [print\(p.project_name, p.version\) for p in pkg_resources.working_set]")

PowerShell(cd d:\\programs\\tax-assist; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location d:\\programs\\tax-assist; python -m uvicorn api.main:app --port 8001 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8001/api/user-data" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "OK: sections = $\($r.sections -join ', '\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)

PowerShell(cd d:\\programs\\tax-assist; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location d:\\programs\\tax-assist; python -m uvicorn api.main:app --port 8002 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8002/api/scenarios" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Scenarios: $\($r.scenarios.Count\) found"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8002/api/reports" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Reports: $\($r2.reports.Count\) found" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
